# ParagonNodeDefinition.HIconMask property

`hIconMask` (DT_UINT, `+12`). The symbol icon handle; equals a [`ImageHandle`](../TexFrame/ImageHandle.md) in a paragon atlas (resolve via [`TryGetIconFrame`](../Diablo4Storage/TryGetIconFrame.md)).
